message.content:
1) Yes, the button labeled 'PAUSE SELF-HEAL FOR UPDATES' is visible.  
2) Yes, there is a section titled 'Self-Heal Toggle' (displayed as "[ ] SELF-HEAL TOGGLE" in the dashboard).  
3) The button has an orange border and orange text, with the text "PAUSE SELF-HEAL FOR UPDATES" centered inside it. The button appears to be a rectangular element with a dark background (matching the dashboard's dark theme) and the orange border/text making it stand out.
